member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod
member.summary: Describes the different SQL authentication methods that can be used by a client connecting to Azure SQL Database. For details, see Use Microsoft Entra Authentication.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.NotSpecified
member.summary: The authentication method is not specified.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.SqlPassword
member.summary: The authentication method uses Sql Password. Use Sql Password to connect to a SQL Database using SQL Server authentication.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryPassword
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Password. Use Active Directory Password to connect to a SQL Database using a Microsoft Entra principal name and password.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryIntegrated
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Integrated. Use Active Directory Integrated to connect to a SQL Database using integrated Windows authentication.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryInteractive
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Interactive. Use Active Directory Interactive to connect to a SQL Database with an interactive authentication flow.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryServicePrincipal
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Service Principal. Use Active Directory Service Principal to connect to a SQL Database using the client ID and secret of a service principal identity.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryDeviceCodeFlow
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Device Code Flow. Use Active Directory Device Code Flow to connect to a SQL Database from devices and operating systems that do not provide a Web browser, using another device to perform interactive authentication.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryManagedIdentity
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Managed Identity. Use System Assigned or User Assigned Managed Identity to connect to SQL Database from Azure client environments that have enabled support for Managed Identity. For User Assigned Managed Identity, 'User Id' or 'UID' is required to be set to the "client ID" of the user identity.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryMSI
member.summary: Alias for "Active Directory Managed Identity" authentication method. Use System Assigned or User Assigned Managed Identity to connect to SQL Database from Azure client environments that have enabled support for Managed Identity. For User Assigned Managed Identity, 'User Id' or 'UID' is required to be set to the "client ID" of the user identity.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryDefault
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Default. Use this mode to connect to a SQL Database using multiple non-interactive authentication methods tried sequentially to acquire an access token. This method does not fallback to the "Active Directory Interactive" authentication method.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod.ActiveDirectoryWorkloadIdentity
member.summary: The authentication method uses Active Directory Workload Identity. Use a federated User Assigned Managed Identity to connect to SQL Database from Azure client environments that have enabled support for Workload Identity. The 'User Id' or 'UID' is required to be set to the "client ID" of the user identity.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters
member.summary: Represents AD authentication parameters passed by a driver to authentication providers.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.#ctor(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Construct with values for all properties.
member.param: The user login name/ID, or null if not applicable.
The user password, or null if not applicable.
The authentication timeout, in seconds. The overall connection timeout is managed by the driver; this timeout only applies to authentication.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.AuthenticationMethod
member.summary: Gets the authentication method.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.Resource
member.summary: The resource URIs.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.Authority
member.summary: Gets the authority URI.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.UserId
member.summary: Gets the user login name/ID.
member.value: The user login name/ID, or null if not applicable.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.Password
member.summary: Gets the user password.
member.value: The user password, or null if not applicable.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.ConnectionId
member.summary: Gets the connection ID.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.ServerName
member.summary: Gets the server name.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.DatabaseName
member.summary: Gets the database name.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters.ConnectionTimeout
member.summary: Gets the authentication timeout value, in seconds.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider
member.summary: Defines the core behavior of authentication providers and provides a base class for derived classes.
member.remarks: Derived classes must provide a parameterless constructor if they can be instantiated from the app.config file.
member.summary: Defines the core behavior of authentication providers and provides a base class for derived classes.
member.remarks: Derived classes must provide a parameterless constructor if they can be instantiated from the app.config file.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.BeforeLoad(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod)
member.summary: This method is called immediately before the provider is added to the SQL authentication provider registry.
member.remarks:
Avoid performing long-waiting tasks in this method, since it can block other threads from accessing the provider registry.
This method must not throw.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.BeforeUnload(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod)
member.summary: This method is called immediately before the provider is removed from the SQL authentication provider registry.
member.remarks:
For example, this method is called when a different provider with the same authentication method overrides this provider in the SQL authentication provider registry. Avoid performing long-waiting task in this method, since it can block other threads from accessing the provider registry.
This method must not throw.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.IsSupported(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod)
member.summary: Indicates whether the specified authentication method is supported.
member.returns: if the specified authentication method is supported; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.AcquireTokenAsync(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationParameters)
member.summary: Acquires an access token from the authority.
member.param: The parameters passed to the provider by the driver.
member.returns: Represents an asynchronous operation that returns the AD authentication token.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.GetProvider(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod)
member.summary: Gets an authentication provider by method.
member.returns: The authentication provider or if not found.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.SetProvider(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod,Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider)
member.summary: Sets an authentication provider by method.
member.returns: if the operation succeeded; otherwise, (for example, the existing provider disallows overriding).

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal
member.summary: This class implements the static GetProvider and SetProvider methods by using reflection to call into the Microsoft.Data.SqlClient package's SqlAuthenticationProviderManager class, if that assembly is present.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal._getProvider
member.summary: Our handle to the reflected GetProvider() method.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal._setProvider
member.summary: Our handle to the reflected SetProvider() method.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal.#cctor
member.summary: Static construction performs the reflection lookups.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal.GetProvider(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod)
member.summary: Call the reflected GetProvider method.
member.param: The authentication method whose provider to get.
member.returns: Returns null if reflection failed or any exceptions occur. Otherwise, returns as the reflected method does.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider.Internal.SetProvider(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod,Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProvider)
member.summary: Call the reflected SetProvider method.
member.param: The authentication method whose provider to set.
member.returns: Returns false if reflection failed, invocation fails, or any exceptions occur. Otherwise, returns as the reflected method does.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException
member.summary: This exception is thrown for any errors that occur during the authentication process.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.Unknown
member.summary: The string value used when the failure code is not known.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary:
Protected construction for derived classes to supply a minimal set of values.
Method will be NotSpecified. FailureCode will be "Unknown". ShouldRetry will be false. RetryPeriod will be 0.
member.param: The exception that caused this exception, if any.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.#ctor(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationMethod,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Protected construction for derived classes to supply values for all public properties.
member.param: The authentication method that failed, or NotSpecified if not known.
The failure code, or "Unknown" if not known.
True if the action should be retried, false otherwise.

The period of time, in milliseconds, to wait before retrying the action. Specify 0 if no retry period is suggested. Ignored if negative. Not used when ShouldRetry is false, in which cases 0 is assumed.
The exception that caused this exception, if any.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.Method
member.summary: The authentication method that failed, or NotSpecified if not known.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.FailureCode
member.summary: The failure code, or "Unknown" if not known.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.ShouldRetry
member.summary: True if the action should be retried, false otherwise.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.RetryPeriod
member.summary: The period of time, in milliseconds, to wait before retrying the action. 0 if no retry period is suggested. Never negative. Always 0 when ShouldRetry is false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationProviderException.ToString
member.returns: A string that includes the base exception information along with all property values.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken
member.summary: Represents an authentication token.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Construct with values for all properties.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken.TokenException
member.summary: The exception thrown by the SqlAuthenticationToken constructor.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken.TokenException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Construct with the exception message.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken.AccessToken
member.summary: Gets the token string.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlAuthenticationToken.ExpiresOn
member.summary: Gets the token expiration time.
